title: phlegmariurus polydactylus
intro: Phlegmariurus polydactylus, also known as the walking fern or resurrection fern, is a type of lycopodiopsida plant that belongs to the phlegmariurus genus and is native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus polydactylus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with the dried leaves and stems often being used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
